title: Schneider Electric India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Schneider Electric India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Schneider Electric India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Schneider Electric India:
Schneider Electric India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India!
